gazette: Official Gazette dated 24 April 2023 and numbered 32170
title: Regulation on Determination of Preferential Origin of Goods within the Framework of the Trade in Goods Agreement between the Republic of Turkey and the Islamic Republic of Pakistan
bodyHtml:
The origin regulation for the  Trade in Goods Agreement between the Republic of Turkey and the Islamic Republic of Pakistan Government have been published.

Materials originating in a Party shall be considered as materials originating in the other party when incorporated into a product obtained there. It shall not be necessary that such materials have undergone sufficient working or processing, provided that the working or processing carried out there goes beyond the insufficient working or processing (bilateral cumulation)

Products which are not wholly obtained will acquire originating status by fulfilling the conditions set out in Annex-II (if they are sufficiently worked or processed)

Pakistan-origin products shall benefit from the Agreement upon presentation of the TUR-PAK Certificate of Origin when imported into Turkey.

A reference number starting with "TR" in vertical writing shall be entered on the left-hand side of the certificate of origin issued in Turkey.

A TUR-PAK Certificate of Origin shall be valid for twelve months from the date of issue in the exporting Party and shall be submitted within that period to the customs authorities of the importing Party.

This Regulation enters into force on the date of its publication, to be effective as of 1/5/2023.
